name: feishu-user-plugin
display_name: Feishu User Plugin for Claude Code
description: All-in-one Feishu plugin — send messages as yourself, read chats, manage docs/tables/wiki. 33 tools + 9 skills, 3 auth layers.

tools.name: send_to_user
tools.description: Search user + send text message as yourself — one step

tools.name: send_to_group
tools.description: Search group + send text message as yourself — one step

tools.name: send_as_user
tools.description: Send text to any chat by ID, supports reply threading

tools.name: send_image_as_user
tools.description: Send image message (requires image_key)

tools.name: send_file_as_user
tools.description: Send file message (requires file_key)

tools.name: send_post_as_user
tools.description: Send rich text with title, paragraphs, links, @mentions

tools.name: send_sticker_as_user
tools.description: Send sticker/emoji

tools.name: send_audio_as_user
tools.description: Send audio message

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search users, bots, or groups by name

tools.name: create_p2p_chat
tools.description: Create/get a P2P (direct message) chat

tools.name: get_chat_info
tools.description: Get group details: name, members, owner

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description: Look up user display name by ID

tools.name: get_login_status
tools.description: Check cookie, app credentials, and UAT status

tools.name: read_p2p_messages
tools.description: Read P2P chat history via OAuth UAT

tools.name: list_user_chats
tools.description: List group chats the user is in (groups only, not P2P)

tools.name: list_chats
tools.description: List all chats the bot has joined

tools.name: read_messages
tools.description: Read message history (accepts chat name or oc_ ID)

tools.name: reply_message
tools.description: Reply to a specific message (as bot)

tools.name: forward_message
tools.description: Forward a message to another chat

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search documents by keyword

tools.name: read_doc
tools.description: Read raw text content of a document

tools.name: create_doc
tools.description: Create a new document

tools.name: list_bitable_tables
tools.description: List tables in a Bitable app

tools.name: list_bitable_fields
tools.description: List fields (columns) in a table

tools.name: search_bitable_records
tools.description: Query records with filter/sort

tools.name: create_bitable_record
tools.description: Create a new record (row)

tools.name: update_bitable_record
tools.description: Update an existing record

tools.name: list_wiki_spaces
tools.description: List all accessible wiki spaces

tools.name: search_wiki
tools.description: Search wiki/docs by keyword

tools.name: list_wiki_nodes
tools.description: Browse wiki node tree

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in a Drive folder

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder in Drive

tools.name: find_user
tools.description: Find user by email or mobile number

environment_variables.name: LARK_COOKIE
environment_variables.description: Feishu web login cookie string (required for user identity messaging)

environment_variables.name: LARK_APP_ID
environment_variables.description: Feishu Open Platform App ID (required for official API)

environment_variables.name: LARK_APP_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Feishu Open Platform App Secret (required for official API)

environment_variables.name: LARK_USER_ACCESS_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: OAuth user_access_token for P2P chat reading (run: node src/oauth.js)

environment_variables.name: LARK_USER_REFRESH_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: OAuth refresh_token for automatic UAT renewal (obtained via OAuth flow)
